treatment_information.dosage_or_details: Three intravenous boluses of 30 mg/kg for the first 3 days, followed by 1 mg/kg/day IV
treatment_information.treatment_response: Clinical and inflammatory parameters remained unchanged
Dramatic and immediate improvement; patient was apyretic at 24 hours, cardiac and respiratory rates improved, oxygen saturation increased to 98%

treatment_timeline.event: Patient treated with nonsteroidal anti-inflammatory drugs
Three intravenous boluses of 30 mg/kg methylprednisolone administered for the first 3 days, followed by 1 mg/kg/day IV methylprednisolone
Patient's condition worsened, admitted to ICU
Patient's condition improved within 12 hours of first anakinra dose
Patient discharged from ICU 1 day after anakinra treatment
Diffuse arthritis appeared, subcutaneous methotrexate started at 15 mg/wk
Two local injections of triamcinolone hexacetonide performed during follow-up
Patient was well, pericardial effusion disappeared, inflammatory parameters normalized

patient_outcome.final_status: Well, pericardial effusion disappeared, inflammatory parameters normalized
patient_outcome.follow_up_details: Steroid therapy was tapered down to 0.2 mg/kg/d, anakinra and methotrexate were continued
